intent: Replay the v0.7.0 release governance consistency path before AAOS release proof review.

replay_steps.expected_observation: README status, tracker issue, PR merge state, release tag, next phase, and governance boundary fields are present.

replay_steps.action: Evaluate release proof completeness and authority-boundary preservation.
replay_steps.expected_observation: Evaluator produces evidence outputs only and does not approve or publish the release.

replay_steps.action: Confirm Decision Proof sealing remains outside runtime replay.
replay_steps.expected_observation: Replay packet remains unsealed and points to AAOS-owned sealing logic.

replay_result.expected_result: Release proof evidence is replay-ready and remains non-authoritative.
replay_result.actual_result: Release proof evidence is replay-ready and remains non-authoritative.

not_authority_statement: Runtime replay and release proof automation may reconstruct evidence but must not approve releases, publish releases, seal Decision Proof, close audits, or make final governance judgments.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS retains purpose and business intent, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, final risk classification, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, and final governance authority.
